character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Injured in a fight with Black Dog, later suffers a stroke after drinking rum. Refers to himself as Billy Bones.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Assists the captain, fetches rum, and interacts with Doctor Livesey. Witnesses the captain's condition.

character_dossiers.name: Doctor Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Treats the captain for a stroke, draws blood, and warns him about rum.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: Helps the captain after the fight and expresses distress over the situation.

character_dossiers.name: my father
character_dossiers.biography: Sick and involved in the aftermath of the captain's incident.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: Fugitive pursued by the captain, injured in a fight with the captain.

character_dossiers.name: old Flint
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned by the captain as a seafaring man and a former captain.

character_dossiers.name: Billy Bones
character_dossiers.biography: Alias used by the captain, referenced in the doctor's dialogue.
